title: A genome-skimming phylogeny of ctenostome bryozoans
author: Waeschenbach, Andrea
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: MATRIX : All_genes_alignment.nex: Mixed concatenated alignment of mitochondrial protein-coding genes as amino acids and mitochondrial and nuclear ribosomal RNA genes as nucleotids TREES : All data: Bayesian: All_genes_mb_burnin_3000.tre ML: All_genes_RAxML.tre Nuclear genes only: Bayesian: 18S_28S_mb_burnin_5000.tre ML: 18S_28S_RAxML.tre Mitochondrial genes only: Bayesian: All_mito_mb_burnin_1700.tre ML: All_mito_RAxML.tre
